§6Circuit Components§f

§aCraft the building blocks: vacuum tubes, capacitors, PCBs, and microchips.§f

All higher circuits share these base components. Automate them early.

§6Components§f:
§b• Vacuum Tube§f: Glass + tungsten wire + insulator. Crafted at a table. Also found in IBM PCs and satellite dishes.
§b• Capacitor§f: Insulator + copper wire + aluminium powder. Used in massive quantities.
§b• Tantalium Capacitor§f: Upgrade. Insulator + tantalium nugget + copper wire.
§b• PCB (Printed Circuit Board)§f: Insulator + copper plate.
§b• Microchip§f: Printed silicon wafer + copper wire + insulator.
§b• Versatile IC§f: PCB + microchips + bismuth.

§6Special Components§f:
§b• Atomic Clock§f: Microchips + strontium powder.
§b• Quantum Processor§f: Hard plastic + BSCCO wire + ionized particles.

§eTip§f: Set up automated production of capacitors and PCBs before scaling up — you will need hundreds per circuit.
